title: Drawer
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Drawer wrapper composed from the local Base UI Drawer primitive, shadcn slot classes, local class canonicalization, deterministic direction variants, and static local examples.

registry.reason: shadcn Drawer composes the local Base UI Drawer primitive.
shadcn Drawer uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema variants and Array helpers used by local examples.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin vaul Drawer primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Drawer implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin plus/minus icons are represented with local static SVG markup in installable Foldkit examples.
Origin chart examples are represented with local static chart bars instead of a charting runtime dependency.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local deterministic RTL example data.
Origin responsive Dialog/Drawer composition is outside this Drawer-only slice.
Examples use local static button class shells instead of importing a Button dependency.
The responsive Drawer/Dialog demo is deferred to avoid expanding this task beyond Drawer.
Input is only used by the deferred responsive Drawer/Dialog demo.
Label is only used by the deferred responsive Drawer/Dialog demo.

examples.title: DrawerDemo
examples.description: Activity goal drawer with static local controls and chart bars.

examples.title: DrawerScrollableContent
examples.snippet:
export const DrawerScrollableContent = <Message = never>(
  controller: DrawerExampleController<Message> = {},
): Html =>
  drawerShell(
    {
      id: 'drawer-scrollable-content',
      trigger: 'Scrollable Content',
      title: 'Move Goal',
      description: 'Set your daily activity goal.',
      direction: 'right',
      body: scrollableBody(),
      footer: footerButtons({ cancel: 'Cancel', submit: 'Submit' }),
    },
    controller,
  )

const drawerDirections: ReadonlyArray<DrawerDirection> = [
  'top',
  'right',
  'bottom',
  'left',
]

examples.title: DrawerWithSides
examples.description: Drawer direction variants for top, right, bottom, and left.

examples.title: DrawerRtl
examples.description: RTL drawer with local static translations.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Drawer attributes instead of importing vaul or upstream React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React, vaul, or upstream runtime packages.

deviations.summary: Examples use local static Button shells instead of origin app dependencies.
deviations.rationale: Those components are outside this Drawer slice. Static local markup preserves the relevant Drawer DOM, class, ARIA, and visual contracts.

deviations.summary: The activity goal example uses static SVG icons and chart bars instead of lucide-react and recharts runtime imports.
deviations.rationale: lucide-react and recharts are not installable runtime dependencies for this registry item.

deviations.summary: The responsive Drawer/Dialog composition example is deferred because this task explicitly does not implement Sheet or broaden cross-component responsive composition.
deviations.rationale: Plan 055 owns Drawer only and the user explicitly asked not to implement Sheet or refactor unrelated registry items.
